title: I Can't Concentrate
overview: SangWoo studies in the library alone until JaeYoung joins him.

title: Don't Call Me "Hyung"
overview: JaeYoung and SangWoo go out drinking and play Yaja Time.

title: All Talk, No Responsibility
overview: JaeYoung flirts with SangWoo on the phone.

title: April Fools (Unreleased Side Story)
overview: JaeYoung sends SangWoo on a treasure hunt.
